response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and demonstrable ownership across diverse domains, including high-throughput systems and open-source tooling — aligning well with the role’s technical and operational demands. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of AI-native engineering environments or direct experience with AI-generated code workflows, and his recent role at re:cinq mentions AI-agent infrastructure without clarifying his hands-on involvement with agentic code production or review.
strengths: Proven track record in distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong operational ownership evidenced by DevOps setup, on-call readiness, and open-source project leadership
Broad technical depth across languages and systems, with clear architectural thinking and tooling innovation
concerns: No clear evidence of direct experience reviewing or extending AI-generated code in an agentic engineering environment
Limited visibility into stakeholder management or cross-functional technical strategy beyond individual contributions
Recent role at re:cinq is listed as current but starts in April 2025 — a future date, raising red flag about resume accuracy
